headlines.description: — As it became evident that All-Star Jayson Tatum would have to sit out Game 2 of the Celtics' first-round playoff series against the Orlando Magic, Jaylen Brown wanted Boston coach Joe Mazzulla to know something.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jaylen Brown scores 36 as Celtics beat Magic 109-100 without Jayson Tatum

headlines.description: — Donovan Mitchell delivered when the Cleveland Cavaliers needed him most.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mitchell scores 30 points, Cavaliers hold off Heat 121-112 to take 2-0 lead in NBA playoff series

events.name: Golden State Warriors at Houston Rockets

headlines.description: — In his playoff debut this weekend Jalen Green admitted that playoff jitters got the best of him.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Green makes eight 3s with 38 points to help Rockets even series with 109-94 win over Warriors
